name: git
description: Git 工作流命令插件，提供提交/推送/MR 创建、远程平台操作（GitHub/GitLab）、自动代码审查（Agent Team 审查+辩论 + Codex 双视角），支持项目自定义审查清单

interface.shortDescription: Commit, push, MR/PR, and dual-perspective code review skills for the TapTap workflow
interface.longDescription: Skills for committing changes, pushing branches, creating MR/PR on GitLab and GitHub, fixing merge conflicts, fetching GitLab content, retriggering MR pipelines, and running dual-perspective code review with a Claude + Codex agent team debate.
